programs.title: Young Sheldon
programs.sub_title: A Computer, a Plastic Pony, and a Case of Beer
programs.desc: Sheldon asks for a computer and unknowingly sparks an argument between Mary and George Sr. over the family's finances; Mary and the twins move in with Meemaw.

programs.title: Peter Popoff Ministries
programs.desc: For over 30 years, Reverend Peter Popoff has provided spiritual direction and powerful testimonies to receive God's blessings in your life.

programs.title: Two and a Half Men
programs.sub_title: A Sympathetic Crotch to Cry On
programs.desc: When Evelyn reads in the obituaries that her second husband, Harry, has died, she attends the funeral with Alan, then is furious to learn that Alan had kept in touch with Harry after the divorce.

programs.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programs.desc: Abishola must reconcile a decade-old wound when she's forced to attend the funeral of an unlikable aunt; Bob struggles at the factory with the first batch of socks before receiving support from an unlikely source.

programs.title: The Goldbergs
programs.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big party while Lainey's father is out of town; Murray is annoyed by the amount of time Adam spends on the phone talking to Dana.

programs.title: PIX11 Morning News at 4am
programs.desc: Staying informed with the news and headlines.
